title: ErrorEnvelope
description: Standard error response envelope for all Atlas API errors. See specs/crosscut/errors.md for failure semantics contract.

message.description: Human-readable error message safe for external display. MUST NOT contain internal details, stack traces, or sensitive information.

correlationId.description: Request correlation ID for distributed tracing (INV-ERR-01)

supportId.description: Opaque support identifier that maps to internal diagnostic records (INV-ERR-01). Used by support teams to locate detailed logs.

$comment: This schema enforces INV-ERR-04 (Structured Response) from specs/crosscut/errors.md. All error responses from Atlas APIs MUST conform to this envelope.
